answer: Consensus does not offer a public, self-serve developer API for general use. While documentation exists for a v1 quick search endpoint, access is restricted to enterprise accounts [1][2]. There is no free tier available for API access; those interested in enterprise-level programmatic access must contact Consensus directly through their website to request an API key [1]. The available platform features, including free-tier usage of the research tool, are intended for end-user web or MCP-based workflows rather than direct programmatic integration [1][3].
